problem id: c23fca57
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  00101101 -> 10100111
  10000011 -> 01111000
  00101111 -> 11100111
  10110000 -> 00011111
  10000111 -> 11111000
  10111111 -> 11111111
  10001000 -> 00011001
  10100001 -> 00111110
  11110001 -> 00111111

query: 01000001
predicted answer: 00101100
